summary: Markets show bullish momentum in commodities like gold, silver, and oil, driven by a massive surge in perpetuals trading volume on crypto exchanges. Crypto sentiment remains neutral to positive amid Q1 2026 stabilization and macro sensitivity comparisons to gold. Forex and stocks lack strong directional signals from today's commentary.
